title: RealisticSeasons
description: Premium multi-world seasons plugin with biome-aware weather, persistent temperature preferences, crops, mobs, and immersive effects.
body:
# RealisticSeasons

**RealisticSeasons** is a polished Paper/Spigot seasons plugin that changes gameplay, not just visuals.

It gives your server a real world rhythm with multi-world season tracking, biome-aware weather, temperature pressure, crop pacing, mob shifts, and immersive ambient effects.

## New in 1.1.0
- Added `/seasons calendar [world]` with a clean 4-season look-ahead
- Added persistent `/seasons temp scale <celsius|fahrenheit|server>`
- Temperature HUD visibility now persists between restarts
- Improved `/seasons info` and `/seasons forecast` for everyday player use
- Fixed command/build issues and cleaned the packaged source/runtime behavior

## Core Features
- 4 configurable seasons: Spring, Summer, Fall, Winter
- Smooth per-world seasonal transitions
- Biome-aware weather behavior with rain / snow logic
- Temperature survival effects with heat and cold pressure
- Crop growth and harvest modifiers by season
- Seasonal mob spawning adjustments
- Immersive seasonal ambient effects
- Admin weather controls for live server management

## Player Commands
- `/seasons info`
- `/seasons forecast`
- `/seasons calendar`
- `/seasons temp toggle`
- `/seasons temp now`
- `/seasons temp scale <celsius|fahrenheit|server>`

## Admin Commands
- `/seasons set <season>`
- `/seasons skip`
- `/seasons pause`
- `/seasons resume`
- `/seasons admin reload`
- `/seasons admin setworld <world> <season>`
- `/seasons admin event <start|stop>`
- `/seasons admin weather clear [world] [minutes]`
- `/seasons admin weather status [world]`
- `/seasons admin weather sync [world]`
- `/seasons admin weather reset [world]`
- `/seasons admin weather lock <clear|storm|seasonal> [world] [minutes]`
- `/seasons admin weather unlock [world]`

## Why Servers Keep It Installed
- Gives survival worlds a long-term gameplay loop without needing custom items or complicated setup
- Makes farming, travel, and survival planning feel more alive
- Adds player-readable tools instead of admin-only systems
- Works well on SMP, towny, economy-survival, and immersion-heavy servers

## Best Fit
- Survival SMP servers
- Towny / Kingdom communities
- Immersion-focused gameplay packs
- Servers that want environmental progression without full RPG overhead

## Support The Project
If RealisticSeasons helps your server grow, support future updates:
- [Buy Me a Coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/perusi)

RealisticSeasons adds long-term world rhythm with strong admin control, better player readability, and stable runtime behavior.
